decisions.tp2: Restore TP2 to the 1D path and aggregate scoring only after path projection, source_segment, and finite prediction gates pass.
decisions.tw10: Keep TW10 excluded from aggregate scoring until a forward model emits an active-HX shell-state temperature.
decisions.upcomer: Target a hybrid throughflow pipe plus recirculating convection-cell model, not a single-stream pipe closure for recirculating rows.
decisions.boundary_layer: Quantify hydraulic and thermal boundary-layer development effects by segment on mdot and TP/TW errors.

guardrails: TP/TW probes remain post-solve validation targets only.
Do not use recirculating rows as fitted single-stream Nu/f_D/K evidence.
